STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_EVENT_ODD_MERCHANT_EVE:
After leaving the shop, you wander through winding paths and somehow stumble upon another store you've never seen before. The merchant behind the counter wears a tailcoat and top hat, smiling with impeccable courtesy.

"Ah, just came out of a shop, did you? Short on money already? I might be able to help."
Lose all your gold. Obtain a [#a9a9a9]Loan[] curse.

The merchant deftly files away two of your cards, then pushes a bag of gold toward you.

"A fair trade, as always."

The merchant sweeps every coin from your pouch and hands you a contract.

"Sign it. Debt is still better than having no way forward."
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_EVENT_IRON_AND_BEAST_E: Inside the Spire, you discover two phantasmal shadows. One is as massive as a giant beast, the other matches your own shape. You can express your intent before they fade away.
Remove [#f5d252]2[] cards from your deck, lose [red]8[] max HP, and shuffle [purple]Moonlit Gaze[] into your deck.
Lose all your gold and shuffle [purple]Nonexistence[] into your deck.
Shuffle [purple]Normality[] into your deck. Gain 3 random relics (fixed: 1 Common, 1 Uncommon, 1 Rare).
Other players have not selected this option yet.
Your mockery turns into a price paid, and in return you claim one more burden and three treasures.
Interesting. I will keep watching you.
The shadows let out a silent scoff, then fade away together.
